entry.title: Re: SAP MDK - push notifications and other issues
entry.content:
For #a, use step 1 to 2 from the  push-customclient_tutorial .

I tried this option a and followed step 1 and 2 for standard MDK client which I had already generated using cloud build job. But I don't see any 'push registration success' message when I launch the app.

I even tried to run another cloud build job and installed the app again by the latest binaries but no use. I don't see any device registration information in mobile services aswell.  

Is it because there is no step to add 'google-services.json' file for standard MDK client ? Please throw some light here Jitendra_Kansal .

entry.title: Re: Project Coding Mask Visibility in Project Definition...
entry.content: Start by entering the Project ID in the top box, if your entry is covered by a defined coding mask if will show up.

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...
entry.content:
Hey João,
it feels a little less lonesome to know that we're not alone solving these issues. To be honest, I have just found the solution (for my case at least) just now.
The reason why it this error popped up in my case was because I might have accidentally set the "Starting Library Automatically" with a particular group (the first picture attached). 

When I set it back to default (the second picture below), it worked.


I still don't have a theoretical response why it did not work but maybe @karenperez and @DirkManuel might be able to help us - as they are SEN experts.
Good luck!
Best,
Anh

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting SAP Certification discount code for special programs
entry.content:
@ThomasTQ - It looks like that page is for an activation code - not a campaign code. 

This code should be applied during the checkout process. Please check the guide on how to redeem it: https://training.sap.com/help-center/faq/how-to-use-a-campaign-code-during-an-online-booking

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.14
entry.content: The link to the SAP Analytics Cloud add in for Microsoft PowerPoint does not seem to work. Page not found error.  https://help.sap.com/docs/page-not-found?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhelp.sap.com%2Fdocs%2FSAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD_PPT. The help portal does not list anything either

entry.title: BOM not getting completely exploded in Planned Order/ Production Order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently facing a problem, where it seems the BOM is not getting fully exploded when creating planned orders with MRP. The planned order only shows me 2 components of 5. Only after I click explode BOM, the other 3 materials appear in the component tab.

The BOM used is for a conifurable product. When creating planned order for another variant of this product, all components appear correctly initally in the planned order.

Can someone guide me in the direction of where I need to check?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Can SAP Ariba be Integrated with Azure Data Factory
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to extract data from SAP Ariba to create analytics in Power BI.
I have Azure Data Factory (ADF) and want to check if SAP Ariba can be integrated with ADF?

When I searched for SAP, these are the connections that I am currently getting:

Does SAP Ariba could be in one of these services?
Or is it not compatible with ADF yet?

Could someone please help me? Any help will be much appreciated.

entry.title: SAP ERP-EWM-DM integration issues.
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

We tried to integrate SAP embedded EWM with SAP DM. The connection for master data works between SAP S/4 HANA & DM works fine( At least we think it's fine) because we can able to see the order download in SAP integration message dashboard.

1#. 

But after download, everything shows as failed, for example messages such as "Production Order PRT Download", "Order Status Sync (RMES)", "EWM Staging Request" shows as failed status. 

2#.

3#.

4#.

5#. 

 

 

We already checked the complete integration regarding  this page " Connecting to EWM in SAP S/4HANA 2021 | SAP Help Portal" but we could not able to resolve the issue.

6#.

As per SAP standard process as soon as Production order is released and WM Staging is executed, the order should appear in "Manage Staging 2.0 app" in SAP DM. But it's not the case.

Along with that we see PPF actions warning in /SCWM/PMR

7#

 

If some one could able to help in this issue would be great.

entry.title: AFO Tabs Not Recognizing Connection to BW - Seeking Assistance
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am assisting a user who is encountering an issue with SAP Analysis for Office (AFO) where the tabs do not appear to recognize that they are AFO tabs, and are supposed to be connecting to BW.

The issue still exists even after following the steps to manually establish connections, which can be found here: Most common issues with Analysis for Office 2.8 SP... - SAP Community

After attempting to manually connect, the sources now show up in the Analysis window, which wasn't the case previously, but the data doesn't act like AFO data should. Double-clicking on the data, for example, does not initiate the standard drill-down or filtering functions.

We've tried rearranging the tabs, but it only fixes part of the problem. It appears that the information is not fully represented as AFO data. Has anyone else encountered this problem before, or does anyone know how to fix it?

 

Any help or guidance on this issue would be greatly appreciated.

 

Thank you,

Liz M

 

#SAP #SAP AFO

entry.title: Override back button on FLP
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to override the back button behavior on Sap Build Workzone. My application is Fiori Elements with Fiori Freestyle with odata v4. I want to raise an exception when a user is in the Object Page in edit mode and clicks on the back button. I tried the suggestions here https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/flp-nav-back-button-issue/qaq-p/12142325/comment-id/4538564#M4538564. But didn't work for me. I tried using this part:

this.getOwnerComponent().getService("ShellUIService").then(function(oShellService) {
    oShellService.setBackNavigation(function() {
        //either do nothing to disable it, or add your own nav back logic for having the navigation
    });
});

In the onAterRendering method of the Object Page controller, but it doesn't enter the setBackNavigation function. Can someone help with this issue.

 

Thanks,

Violina

entry.title: Re: A suggestion on how to approach networking and a career search in the SAP ecosystem
entry.content: @KunalBansal - I noticed your interview tips in the career corner! Maybe you might have something to add here for the beginner audience! 😊

entry.title: SENIOR BERATER (M/W/D) SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD
entry.content:
Das wird Dein Tag

Als Senior Berater für SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) entwickelst und implementierst Du Lösungen im Bereich Reporting und Planung mit SAC. Du analysierst Kundenanforderungen und bereitest diese zur Konzeption und Erstellung entsprechender Reports und effizienter Planungsprozesse auf. Darüber hinaus führst Du Workshops und Schulungen für Reporting- und Planungsanwendungen in SAC durch. Du überführst bestehende Lösungen in SAC, arbeitest eigenständig an Kundenprojekten, unterstützt das Team und trägst zur Kundengewinnung bei. Zudem baust du Prototypen auf dem firmeneigenen SAP-System auf und förderst den Wissenstransfer im Team. Du spielst eine zentrale Rolle bei der erfolgreichen Implementierung von SAP Analytics Cloud.

Du bist bei uns richtig mit

  • abgeschlossenem Wirtschafts- oder Informatikstudium oder einer vergleichbaren Qualifikation
  • > 5 Jahre Erfahrung als Berater im SAP Analytics Umfeld (BW, BO, SAC) oder als interner Anwendungsbetreuer
  • Verständnis für die Unternehmensprozesse und deren Abbildung in SAP
  • tiefreichenden Kenntnissen in ABAP, Java Script und SQL S4 Debugging sowie Expertise in der Implementierung von Lösungen im Bereich SAP BW und SAP S/4HANA (Datenmodellierung , ETL-Prozesse, Berechtigungen etc.)
  • Erfahrung in der Leitung von IT-Projekten und Expertise im Projektmanagement
  • sehr guten Deutschkenntnissen in Wort und Schrift
  • Eigeninitiative, Verantwortungsbewusstsein, Spaß an Teamarbeit, Offenheit & Kommunikationsfreude

Darauf kannst Du Dich freuen

  • volle Flexibilität bei Arbeitszeit, Einsatzrate, Arbeitsort
  • attraktive Gesamtvergütung von 80-120 TEUR (inkl. Bonus)
  • variables Urlaubskonzept, Workation, Sabbatical
  • cooler Standort im Design Offices
  • Mobilitätspauschale oder Firmenwagen
  • MacBook, iPhone und iPad
  • Umzugskosten-Zuschuss

Und das ist längst nicht alles – es warten noch weitere Benefits auf Dich.

entry.title: Re: S4HC- Create the billing document for down payment
entry.content:
Hi Haily,

In your example you will have 2 customer invoices:

  • one down payment request invoice (billing type FAZ) and
  • one closing invoice (billing type F2).

The down payment invoice FAZ is handled differently in FI. It leads to down payment request FI posting with special G/L indicator, means the incoming payment is posted as FI down payment. This FI posting is cleared, when creating the final invoice and posting final incoming payment.

It is very detailed explained in this blog: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-understand-the-fi-postings-made-in-sd-down-payment-scenario/ba-p/13345325

In case you want 2 customer invoices (billing type F2) you can choose Partial Billing. In this case you don't have a downpayment. It is handled in FI as 2 invoices.

Regards,

Doreen

entry.title: Re: Extracting more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.
entry.content:
Check below steps, if this works:

1. Log in to SAP system.
2. Open transaction code SE16N.
3. Enter table name and click "Display."
4. Click "Settings" in table display screen.
5. Select "User Parameters" from drop-down menu.
6. Search for "MAX_SEL" parameter.
7. Create "MAX_SEL" if not available.
8. Enter parameter and desired record limit.
9. Save changes.

After this, you should normally able to export more than 5000 records from SE16/SE16N.

entry.title: Re: Where is info about purchasing/downloading "Enterprise Connect Data Access" ?
entry.content: EDCA / Replication Server Heterogeneous Edition are no longer avaialble. See https://me.sap.com/notes/3408368 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2702069

entry.title: Re: How to you remove Action links in Adapt UI
entry.content: Hmmmm… ok RaminS. That’s interesting and very helpful to understand how your team is organised. In that case they would need to work together on the holistic role design, maintenance and support. They also need some crossover tools as BR/BC changes directly impact security roles, and authorizations impact on BR & app behaviour.  Without having some oversight there is a high risk of wasted time in resolving issues.  Launchpad content aggregator would be a possible crossover tool for security to check what is assigned to the business role.  App Support would be of some help in the other direction as it tracks some auth issues.  I might have to check with my security auth experts on other read only tools that would give some oversight for the Fiori team to cross check authorizations. Possibly one of the SACM simulation tools.  I’ll think about it.

entry.title: Re: Primary Email in Onboarding
entry.content: Pardon my french Praveen_s, but you are a **bleep** god! It works, THANKS!

entry.title: ABAP CDS View date parameter
entry.content:
hello All,

how to create a parameter in cds view that i must be able to choose either a month, a week or a date using a single date parameter 

the parameter should show the aggregation of the date as year->month->week->day

is there any way to achieve this ?

Thanks in Advance

ABAP Development

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
@RaminSyou're right. "Adapt UI" only hides UI elements; it doesn't actually remove them.

Perhaps some context can help clarify how Action Links are created. In this scenario, Action Links (also called Smart Links) are automatically generated based on the roles or catalogs assigned to your end users. So, you don't need to tweak the UI to achieve your goal. Instead, you should adjust the role assignment or your catalog's configuration, such as removing the mentioned apps from your catalog. Both tasks are typically handled by a Fiori Launchpad admin.

While I'm not a Fiori Launchpad expert, this documentation might be helpful to get you started.  Alternatively, you could always post a question in the community targeted to Fiori Launchpad experts or to the application developers.

entry.title: Re: CDS view I_COMPANYCODE extraction to SAP BW4H
entry.content:
If you want to extract all company codes regardless of their language key, you could possibly modify the CDS view (IFICOMPANYCODE) to include all language keys in the extraction. I guess you can do this by removing any language key filters or WHERE clauses that restrict the extraction to only DE and EN.

By doing this, all company codes, including those with language keys other than DE and EN should be extracted to BW4H.

But, please note that this may result in additional data being extracted and stored in BW4H, which could impact system performance and storage requirements!

Please, before making any changes to the CDS view, it is recommended to consult with your BW4H and ECC system administrators to understand the potential impact and ensure that it aligns with your system requirements and limitations!

entry.title: How to communicate the value of Enterprise Architecture in SAP projects
entry.content:
Hi Architects!

In this post I would like to lead you through my thoughts and experiences on how to emphasize and place the value of EA work within SAP projects, either towards internal stakeholders or clients. Mind you this is more of an unsorted list and not meant to underline a sequence or priority and more based on my experience in EA within the context of SAP projects (I am sure some of this can be abstracted well for other non-SAP use cases too, however surely you won't deny there is a certain uniqueness to SAP projects).

I greatly appreciate your inputs towards your own experience, or any way you find yourself agreeing or disagreeing to drive the discussion.

Consideration #1 - Greenfield vs. Brownfield

A brownfield client will have a set of experience with SAP products (good and bad) that also comes with expectations as to what the goal should look like and what typical roadblocks could be. For this context it is especially important to keep in mind what the overall disruption to the remainder of the existing systems and processes means and how those can be integrated. 

How the value of EA can be communicated: EA can support the planning of integrations (i.e. via roadmaps), reduce complexity by checking vs. no longer required SBBs and create decision transparency throughout the implementation.

Compared to this a greenfield client will be much less burdened by previous challenges in SAP implementations and software debt, but requires a stronger alignment on what it means to start from scratch. In these instances the opportunitites to standardize and innovate are bigger along the risks to be overly creative in technology decisions, leading to potentially oversized landscapes or landscapes that miss the mark of what the business needs.

How the value of EA can be communicated: By taking the lead in understanding the business strategy and aligning it well with the IT goals EA can provide benefit in both the overall formulation of the implementation goal as well as creating an explicit understanding on both business and IT side of what is needed.

Consideration #2 - Stakeholder analysis =/= emphasis

Understanding your stakeholders is not only a task required to properly go through the preliminary and vision phases of your EA work, but also the foundation for understanding many arguments for and against certain ABBs / SBBs. However securing the buy-in needed from the stakeholders requires more than placing them in a list and ranking their influence. 

How the value of EA can be communicated: EA creates the opportunity to find an (often) outside perspective on many facets of business and IT both. As an EA is required to communicate with various stakeholder from different departments they can facilitate an understanding between them and assist in informing them on synergies, as well as help avoid isolated department only solutions to maybe organisation-wide challenges.

Consideration #3 - Deliver key messages

It is quite easy to get lost in the intricacies of our various in- and outputs needed to progress through the phases of EA. As with other areas of IT more often than not time pressure or similar constraints can create a disconnect between the actual work done and the work shown throughout the process. Hence it is vital to regularly communicate deliverables, insights and changes to stakeholder.

How the value of EA can be communicated: Providing a proper communication plan creates the foundation of delivering key messages, and thereby value, to stakeholders. Due to working closely with stakeholders EAs have a strong hold on communicating results with them. Further on the EA can setup / help in setting up KPIs to measure the architecture against, providing the basis for propagating measurable value achieved, necessary findings and changes, to the organisation. Overall a better transparency and a review of successful initiatives can be achieved.

Consideration #4 - Focus on methodology

Using established standards (i.e. TOGAF or yet-to-be established standards like SAP IEAF) shows that the delivery of architecture work in and off itself is transparent in its progress, its in- and outputs, and the artefacts it creates. As in other lines of business and technology standardization allows for efficiency and consistency.

How the value of EA can be communicated: By using standards and standard frameworks the client / organisation has a baseline of security that there is no experimentation or overtly big inefficiencies in the work products themselves. While these are standard frameworks most can (and should) be adapted (read: tailored) towards the specific needs of the context and thereby provide a degree of customization that prevents just following the method to the letter, required or not. Providing not just transparency and planning, but also the capability to measure and monitor throughout a project helps resolve newly occuring changes or situations (not previously planned for) from the central perspective the EA can provide. 

Hope you found this post insightful.

EDIT: If you are looking for some further insights I can also recommend this post by Paul from some years ago: Four Tips That Lead Enterprise Architects from Mis... - SAP Community

Br,

Toni

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now error: configuration file could not be...
entry.content: @HoangAnhNguyen: Your problem is that you are using the object itself as the Library Autostart. The Library Autostart is designed to be a Book Page that is displayed on the rightmost side of the Trainer when that object is selected, instead of the usual Short Description/Description being displayed. SAP Enable Now is probably just getting confused here; I don't think it is related to the OP. But make sure the object specified in the Library Autostart is also published. See if that helps.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Identity Services offered as Trial Version
entry.content: @rahuljain257 Which kind of instructions are you looking for? I assume your S/4 HANA tenant uses an IAS tenant for user login already, so I would simply establish trust between your BTP subaccount and the same tenant to achieve SSO. Am I missing something? Do you need details on that?

entry.title: Re: Delete Vendor order confirmation
entry.content: Can't anyone here help me?

entry.title: Restricting SAP Cloud ALM user access for Features/Change and Deployment Management
entry.content:
Hi,

This is in regard to SAP Cloud ALM user access for Transport management via Features. We need clarification or help on restricting user access of the following:

1. Can Feature creating access be restricted ? We don't want all users with project member access to create or Edit Features.

2. Can Copy option be restricted? We don't want all users with project member access to release changes as we are in build phase.

3. Can Release option be restricted? We don't want all users with project member access with release option.

4. Can sub tasks of a transports can be released via feature?

5. Can approval step be added for copy and release options as well? We would like the lead to approve before user release copies or original TR.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Restricting SAP Cloud ALM user access for Features/Ch...
entry.content:
This topic is discussed in KBA 3499177 - Restricting user actions in SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation Features.
In summary, a full list of Role Collections and their permitted actions in Features are listed in the Roles and Authorizations table for Features.

There are no additional approvals or restrictions that can be implemented on Features. 
The role collections are currently the only mechanism for controlling the permitted operations for users.

entry.title: Re: Duvidas SAP One Business e Módulo S/4Hana
entry.content:
Ola, @Samuel_Portes_Vieira ,

Supondo que esteja falando de Pedidos de Compra (mesmo se aplica para venda):

  1. Acesse o relatorio de analise de compras: Compras > Relatorios de Compras > Analise de Compras, va ate a aba Fornecedores e insira seus criterios. Quando o relatorio for exibido, de duplo-clique na linha desejada para acessar os detalhes. Vai encontrar quantidade e valor adquirido somente. Se enxergar quantidade como 0, significa que o pedido ja esta fechado. Caso encontre numeros superiores a 0, existem pedidos em aberto para aquele item. Adianto que este relatorio pode ser muito simples e ate confuso. Sugiro a criacao de um relatorio customizado para atender essa necessidade com maior riqueza de detalhes.

  2. Mesmo caminho do item 1, mas usando a aba Itens dessa vez. As mesmas limitacoes e solucoes tambem se aplicam aqui.

  3. Acesse o relatorio de esbocos do documento: Compras > Relatorios de Compras > Relatorio de esbocos do documento e filtre pelo documento desejado e por usuario (usar todos se quiser trazer todo e qualquer documento). Para trazer mais detalhes ao relatorio, provavelmente tera que habilitar campos que por padrao vem ocultos.

  4. Para selecionar multiplas linhas, na maioria dos casos basta usar Shift + Clique

Trouxe aqui somente relatorios padrao do SAP Business One. Sei que pode ser um pouco frustrante nao ter relatorios tao ricos em detalhes assim, ainda mais comparando com um produto tao mais complexo quanto o S4HANA, mas o B1 te permite ao menos a flexibilidade de customizar relatorios que atendam suas necessidades, o que na maioria dos casos acaba sendo a solucao.

Abc,
Felipe

entry.title: Missing App Account Assignment References OTC Transactions - Substitution Rules
entry.content:
• An issue was encountered where the account assignment reference determination (OTC) transaction was missing.
• The "Account Assignment References" substitution rule field was disabled, preventing the addition of a target field.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Missing App Account Assignment References OTC Transac...
entry.content: For solution refer SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3499173 ##3499173 - Missing App Account Assignment References OTC Transactions - Substitution Rules

entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I was facing this issue in SAP Credit management, where while the user is releasing the order in Scase , the order acknowledgment is popping out in the browser in PDF format. this is happening for one particular Business partner , all the user in the team got affected , in the lower system (testing system) it is working fine 

I am not sure of the solution

 

#SAP FICO, #SAP SD, #SAP Credit Management, #SAP Basi

 

Could some please guide the solution on this ?

entry.title: MRP material quantity lot size minimum X multiple
entry.content:
Dear all, 
We have the following scenario:
Looking at planned order / componente overview, The component 000000318i s used to produce the material 000000315 and is consumed in multiples phases in the production process.
The issue is, in the BOM, depends on order quantity, the phase requires 40 ml from component, but the bottle has 1,020 ml. When the bottle is opened and only 40 ml has been used, the other 980 ml is discarded.
For planning (MRP / MD04), they need to see 1,020 ml instead of 40 ml, 1,020 ml instead of 200 ml and so on.
We think in use the component scrap but is only allowed 999,99% and it won't reach 1,020 ml.
Is there any other standard alternative that does not require developing an enhancement?

entry.title: AuC migration HL - S/4hana
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

how should the AuC’s from an R3 system (horizontal layer) be migrated to S/4? Considering that within LTMC we can migrate only active assets, and no assets with 0 value will go through. Thank you!

entry.title: Central asset accounting

Is the Central asset accounting available for activation in S/4hana?

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content: Thanks!

entry.title: Re: confirmed quantity still exists after goods issue
entry.content:
Hi TimoGn,

Goods Issue qty from MIGO (261) is different from confirmed qty, confirmed qty will be updated on your operation details only after doing a production confirmation, either by CO11N or CO15.

Please check if you have already confirmed your order by checking order status or CO14.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content:
I'm really confused with that one!

Locally it seams to be working:

But it always fails with the deployed app:

entry.title: Renumber G/L Accounts, mapping value is in Released mapping status
entry.content:
Mapping is in Released Status and is not proceeding further.
How to convert these G/L Accounts Numbers?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Renumber G/L Accounts, mapping value is in Released m...
entry.content:
If the Mapping value is in Released status, and the conversion has not started yet. Kindly start the conversion using  ‘Convert Renumbered G/L Accounts’ application with business user having SAP_BR_ADMINISTRATOR assigned.

Also refer the Convert Renumbered G/L Accounts (Two-System Landscape) | SAP Help Portal.


Only the following issues are supported in Renumber G/L Accounts:
1. Id change.
2. Description change.
3. Flag change.

entry.title: Re: Best practice for storing and monitoring application logs on BTP

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Thanks @kirilin for your recommendation.

We were able to remove the unwanted smart links by removing the target mappings in the catalog.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Rules creation in Mass for Overhead Projects
entry.content:
Hello Nagendra. Currently there is no functionality to define settlement receiver as a 'GL Account' in current delivered Cloud version. You can vote for the influence request to have this feature. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/235688

In addition you can use SAP Build Process Automation to  mass create and augment automatically assign settlement rule for Work Packages/WBS element. You can have the business process automation for Settlement rules and the objects assigned to them that govern settlements of expenses from WBS elements to their receivers. Please refer to documentation on how to get started with SAP Build Process Automation Starter Pack

You can find below Fiori apps that you can review to perform assignment

Maintain settlement rule for WBS element
Manage Settlement Rules - Projects Fiori App View settlement rules that were defined for existing projects and WBS elements. Learn more with documentation 
Generate Settlement Rules - Projects


Run Settlement - Projects - Actual (Collective)
Orders and projects are used as interim collectors of costs and serve as an aid to the planning and monitoring processes needed. When a job has been completed, you settle the costs to one or more receivers. You can settle an account assignment object, you need to define a settlement rule for the sender. When defining a settlement rule, you can Settle costs to a wide range of receivers (project, sales order, profitability segment, and so on).

Fiori App "Run Settlement - Projects - Actual (Collective)" Specify how the costs are distributed among the receivers. You can use this Fiori App to define the cost elements under which the sender is to be credited and the receivers to be debited.

You can Select the project for which you want to create settlement rules for G/L cost objects on WBS elements and  enter the relevant settlement rule parameters such as settlement receivers and settlement cost elements.

Allocation contexts define the types of sending and receiving objects involved in an allocation. You specify allocation contexts when defining allocation cycles in the Manage Allocations app.

You can settle costs to one or more receiving objects and you need to define a distribution rule for each settlement receiver. Learn more with documentation

Hope this helps

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs"
entry.content: What do the logs reveal? (cf logs [--recent] <your-cf-app-name>)

entry.title: Re: Comprehensive Guide to Unit Testing in CAP
entry.content: Awsome Blog...Kudos to you

entry.title: Planning of activity types in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi All, 

 

The blog from 2015 on SAP indirect activity determination and allocation outlines older methods for managing cost rates (https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/activity-based-costing-in-sap/ba-p/13265081). I'm looking for updated, automated solutions, especially since Universal Parallel Accounting is not active, which prevents the use of the "Manage Cost Rates-Plan" app. Any insights on more current approaches would be appreciated. How can I plan the Cost Rates in an automated way?
 
Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
@RaminS - As previously stated, "Adapt UI", only hides UI elements;  indeed, you can hide cards in OVP using 'Adapt UI'. However, it's important to remember that 'Adapt UI' doesn't actually eliminate these elements.

Could you provide more details about your specific use case? I'm curious as to why simply hiding a card in an OVP app isn't sufficient.

I get that with Action Links, you'd prefer not to allow end users to restore the links independently. However, when you, as a key user, hide a card, an end user doesn't have the capability to unhide that same card on their own.

entry.title: Re: Planning of activity types in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hi, I linked the wrong link - please refer to this https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/steps-for-indirect-activity-determination-and-indirect-activity-allocation/ba-p/13193241

entry.title: SAP EHS SVT: Display Confirmed quantity per order in CBRC20
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We need to display confirmed quantity details per purchase order/Document number in CBRC20 in SVT. As checked, there is a BAdi BADI_EHSRC_TRACK_PROC available for the same. I found the this info "The BAdI BADI_EHSRC_TRACK_PROC is not shipped with an active implementation. However, it does have the corresponding example class CL_EXM_IM_EHSRC_TRACK_PROC, which implements the functions for the detailed data." but not sure what to do with the methods and all to display details in CBRC20 screen.

Could anyone help me with the detailed steps to implement this? It seems no Document or Blog is available

 

Best regards,

Ash

entry.title: SUB BOM AND MRP CALCULATION
entry.content:
Dear All

I'm looking for the right process to manage sub bom's into a global bom (Sap B1, Hana).

I can create a BOM of production (item A) with 2 other production bom's inside (without stages)

- item B (component X and 2 days of labor)

- item C ( component Y and 3 days of labor).

When I run MRP for item A it doesn't calculate the expected date. Recommendation is proposing 2 production orders (B+C) but without calculation time of each sub Bom. So all production orders are placed on the latest day (due date of item A) instead of 3 days before the due date (date of the larger sub item time, C).

Thank you for the support

(sorry for my poor explanation in English)

PP

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Flexibility: Adapting UIs for Specific User Roles
entry.content:
Hi @kirilin .

Just to give you an example, here's the My Sales Overview app (F2200). The cards that I've marked below need to be removed, we don't use Quotations or Credit Memos, and if the users are able to see these it will cause confusion and possible unnecessary calls to our service centers. The sales group has requested these cards to be removed with no option for users to turn them back on. 

So as key-user I can hide the card, but the end-users can go into Manage Cards menu option and unhide them:

 

End-users don't have Adapt UI option, but they have Manage Cards which allows them to unhide what has been hidden by the key-user adaptation.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Schema Assignment for Vendor Types in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi,

First of all if your end users are creating a Vendor why they just don't select the schema group? or What is the benefit for end users to select this field automatically?

I am not sure how you will do the development unless you create Z table and maintain the Schema groups with combination of Account groups for the Vendors. But this is too much just for the single field selection.

Thanks,

Sanan

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Enhance your Sales Growth and Quotation Efficiency through the Power of SAP Commerce and Sales C
entry.content: Really great and comprehensive description of the integration of SAP Commerce Cloud with SAP Sales Cloud v1.

entry.title: Re: reservations for materials for a cost center in another company code
entry.content:
Hi,

This is not possible because Company codes are different entities. And what is the reason you want to reverse in different company code, just curious to understand the business scenario.

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Bean classes are not generated from the *-beans.xml file (Promotion Engine Trail)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on the Promotion Engine Trail and seem to be stuck in the Defining a New Rule-Aware Object step.

I have added the bean definitions according to the steps and the ant clean all returns BUILD SUCCESSFUL. But when I check for the generated classes, I cannot find any. The CustomerReviewRAO class is not generated and the UserRAO class does not have a new field, as it is also not generated at all.

Thanks in advance,
Lara

entry.title: TABLE CUMMULATEDVALUES : Fiscal Year 2024 not permitted (Expected: 2025
entry.content:
Hi SAP Expert,

I'm looking for an urgent advise in S/4 development instance please let me know the right approach of uploading legacy assets if we have two different FYV setup in the system.

For India company code we have are going live on 01/13/2025. And in FAA_CMP (Transfer date - 12.31.2024) and the Highest FYear is 2025 and Closing FYear as 2024 for both the Ledger 0L and R1.

Current Set-up

T093C (co code in AA) – DATUM (Transfer date for legacy) = 12/31/2024.

T093C (co code in AA) – LGJAHR (Highest Open FYear)  = 2025

T093B (Company code-related depreciation area specifications) – ABGJA (Closed FYear) = 2024

 

Note: Since the company code 3320 which we are setting up in S/4 is a subsidiary unit for USA Company and operating from India so we have two FYV in place to meet the legal/ statutory requirement (Jan to Dec - 0L Ledger and April to March - L1 Ledger). And followed which we have two real time depreciation areas 01 with 0L Ledger Group (Jan to Dec) and 02 with R1AA (R1+L1) Ledger Group (Apr to March) in our COD - XXXX.

Please suggest how to approach this when it comes to legacy asset load through LSMW. Because we are facing error message BAPI1022052 while executing through LSMW process. However when we do manual load through AS91/ ABLDT we are not facing any error and the system recognizing the ledger posting as per the FYV setup. 0L ledger - period 12 and R1 ledger - period 12 and L1 ledger - period 09. 

Please help us to understand when we are executing the same through LSMW why system is looking for "Table CUMULATEDVALUES: Fiscal Year 2024 not permitted (expected 2025:” But in ABLDT these two fields i.e. KANSW and KNAFA is editable but NAFAG field is non-editable as we have updated the transfer date as 12.31.2024.

Best Regards,

Gourav Bose

entry.title: Re: Regarding material & Service line item in Purchase Or...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check Tables EKKO and EKPO. You can use SQVI t code to generate a Query and I hope it will fulfill your requirements.

Thanks,

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: STO between a plant that is Automatic Batch Split Valuated and a plant that is not split valuated.
entry.content: I have a plant 1003 that is split batch valuated and 1002 which is not split valuated. When creating a STO purchase order (UB) from 1002 to 1003 I’m getting an error saying “enter valuation type”.

Hi @chp,
It looks like your issue is related to a different learning journey.
Maybe @ChristianR  advise will also help you.
If not, I kindly encourage you to post your inquiry as a new question 

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item bas...
entry.content:
Hi,

unfortunately this functionality is currently not available in billing document apps. It is only possible to not to enable custom fields for displaying in billing UI via app 'Custom Fields'.

You can raise a customer request on our Customer Influence Portal https://www.sap.com/about/customer-involvement/influence-adopt.html.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Cannot access BTP ABAP Trail system from Business Application Studio
entry.content: I’m also facing same issue in BAS. But the above link not valid now. Let me know if any alternative links .

entry.title: Report Batch/Bin
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the T-code to issue a stock report by Batch and BIN?

I have been using ZINV2 for stock reporting, but outputs the total balance by the BIN and the ZINVB outputs the balance by BATCH but without BIN...

entry.title: How to determine the correct tax id per each customer based on country
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on OSS Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002818042/en , the customer tax ID in S4 hana will be maped to each KNA1-STCD* field based on the last number of the tax ID or for some countries with other logic (Argentina, Germany, etc).

I am creating a development where I need to show the tax id number per each customer in the same field, so I need to be able to determine which STCD* will be used per each country,

Someone know how to determine the correct tax id per each country? 

I cant found a function or program to do that.

Regards,

Ale.

entry.title: Re: Function EDI_MM_INVOICE_PROCESSING was not executed successfully - Field Item-PurchaseOrderItemI
entry.content: Hi, how did you set up the communication process for 1MX? For which interface/API you receive the error message?

entry.title: Re: Nonconformance Codes in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @manuel_capretti ,

I normally use ‘Manage Defects’ tile in Fiori. See:

  • https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F2649')/S28OP
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/2bc3ee8d1c83404e8cf62418640004f2/778cc4e03dbd4b8989278b4ff275b744.html

Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: Re: automatically attach outgoing invoices to FI docs
entry.content:
Hi,

please check this community post if this could and fit to your requirement: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-attach-documents-to-a-journal-entry-within-sap-s-4hana-public-cloud/ba-p/13628451

To fetch a PDF from the outgoing invoice, an ODATA API 'Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF' is available on SAP API Hub: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV/overview

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Workzone Advanced - My Workspace template
entry.content: Would like to know this too

entry.title: Where can I start learning how to create master data in SAP Process Control?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Discovering the Key Functionalities of SAP Process Control learning journey

Overview
This learning journey helps to understand how to enable enterprises to efficiently manage governance, risk, and compliance (GRC) needs, and streamline compliance management and internal control processes using advanced features and functionalities of SAP Process Control.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, users will be able to create master data in SAP Process Control, including elements such as organizations, business processes, regulations, risks, control objectives, and account groups. Deep dives into the intricacies of control evaluations and discover the power of continuous control monitoring. Additionally, it explains the potential of standard reporting functionality to enhance your compliance and operational efficiency.

Prerequisites

  • Exploring the Principles of SAP Governance, Risk and Compliance in the S/4HANA Public Cloud

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! 
We are here to support you. I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content: what is the path to get the OAuth 2.0 in SuccessFactors? Any configuration guide or steps to follow this would be helpful. thank you

entry.title: Ariba integration with SCPI
entry.content:
hello everyone, 

in order to map between Ariba purchase requisition fields and HANA purchase requisition fields, we need to integrate via SCPI. Please, could you please tell us which standard Integration Suite package we can use, if there's any? If there isn't, could you confirm if it must be done in a custom integration?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
entry.content: what is the path to get the OAuth 2.0 in SuccessFactors? Any configuration guide or steps to follow this would be helpful. thank you

entry.title: Old deleted demand (PIRs) is copied again while running MC8G
entry.content:
Hello,

Issue is that we want to delete the old demand by one month (PIRs) by executing MD74, PIRs are getting deleted from MD04 and MD63, but latter when programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand from MC94 to PIRs, all the old demand that has been deleted already by MD74 is also being transferred and PIRs reappearing.

We want to delete old PIRs but also need to transfer demand, how can we make to not transfer the old demand that has been deleted already.

This are the steps we are doing:

Review old PIRs in MD04.

Execute MD74 to delete old PIRs by one month ahead.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04.

Execute programs RMCP6BIN and RMCP6RES (MC8G) to transfer demand to PIRs.

Review old PIRs deleted in MD04 are reappearing.

 

Please let me know your comments.

Thank you, regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP Activate is Even Better When Using SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: A great and quite clear infographic. I would also have expected to see some info on the Deploy phase since I believe it is still covered under Implementation?

entry.title: Re: Best Approach for Master Data Integration from Succes...
entry.content: Hi Andreas, Thanks for your reply and detailed explanation. upon my checks i found that scope item JB1 is referred in blog which i shared link(Correct me if i am wrong)of in my QnA Link:https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integrate-sap-s4-hana-cloud-on-premise-with-successfactors-employee-central/ba-p/13574649 and in the same blog it mentions that the standard way of integrating S4 HANA Cloud and SF EC is via SAP Master Data Integration. so i want to understant if SAP Master Data Integration is only the standard way today or it has been replaced by something else.

entry.title: Re: Compensation Planning Story Reports Charts Types
entry.content:
Hello Xavier,

For the compensation template based reports, when we migrate the report to next environment, do we have a way to replace the data source to point to the correct compensation plan of that environment? Right now, we are creating a report from the scratch. Also, when we copy report for the next year template, we do not have the option to replace the data source to new template. Do you know the solution to overcome this challenge?

Thanks

entry.title: Database backup/validation failed at DATABASE with exit code 2.
entry.content: Does anyone know what the above error refers to?  I do have backups being successful in the messages.

entry.title: Re: Credit check not carried out due to missing UKM000 fo...
entry.content:
Hi, Did anyone ever feedback for this issue?

I am experiencing it at my client and I have raised a support case to SAP and got no help.

SAP Simply stated it is a "configuration error issue", but when I asked what configuration is wrong and is there a guide,  i get "there is no guide because every customer system is different, and we will not tell you how to configure your system..."

entry.title: Re: Calling Custom Adobe form in ABAP On Cloud (Embedded Steampunk)
entry.content:
Hi Rahul,

We are trying to create the custom form using the steps provided in this blog, in s/4 Hana public cloud. But in step3: while using the 'Maintain form template' app to upload the custom form to template store 

Expecting 'data source' as mandatory.

is there any other alternative app to upload the custom form to template store?

Thanks,

Sandy

entry.title: Authorization control in GTS system with two logical groups (but same LRs) for two feeder systems.
entry.content:
We shall have two feeder ERP systems for GTS Edition for HANA. There would be two logical system groups in GTS for these feeders. Plan is to use same legal regulations for both logical systems. Is it possible to control authorizations to two different sets of end users for respective ERP data ?

In other words, are there authorization controls available at logical system group level ? If not, any other way to control auths despite having same LRs for two ERPs ?

entry.title: Re: Quality Assurance Approval & Instant Forward for Transport Requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content: Lucidly explained with distilled breakdown of key points.

entry.title: Re: SAP Variant <> of program <> is not the current version
entry.content:
Please check if the new successor reports "RSVARDOC_NEW" and "RSVCHECK_NEW" can be useful, as mentioned in SAP-Note 2875966

Hope this helps

Kind regards

Nic T.

entry.title: Anyone know how to highlight a field with color where the current cursor is in SAP screen personas ?
entry.content: In SAP screen personas do we have an option to highlight the field where the cursor currently is? Like if the screen has say 10 fields, when user tabs the field where the cursor is should be highlighted in a specific color. Can we do this with flavour/Theme or anyother option?
